whatThePolicyRequires: run sketches must be generated through declared visual authority and materialization
manual edits must not be treated as governed evidence
the artifact hash must match the materialized file contents
the materialization receipt must exist before the sketch is claimed as governed evidence
whatThePolicyForbids: hand-authoring a governed run sketch and calling it proof
repairing the sketch by hand after the fact
claiming governed visual evidence without a receipt
claiming the sketch is pipeline-generated before materialization occurs
claiming deterministic visual rendering exists without a renderer
forbiddenClaims: the current hand-authored sketch is governed evidence
the current hand-authored sketch is pipeline materialized
the current hand-authored sketch proves deterministic rendering
the current hand-authored sketch satisfies the run visual evidence standard
completionPosture: Slice 007M.3 is complete when the pipeline path to run sketch materialization is declared and manual authoring is explicitly forbidden.
